/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,librelbot_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so -o librelbot_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/relbot_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/relbot_msgs/msg/detail/relbot_motors__description.c.o CMakeFiles/relbot_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/relbot_msgs/msg/detail/relbot_motors__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/relbot_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/relbot_msgs/msg/detail/relbot_motors__type_support.c.o CMakeFiles/relbot_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/relbot_msgs/msg/detail/relbot_motors_stamped__description.c.o CMakeFiles/relbot_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/relbot_msgs/msg/detail/relbot_motors_stamped__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/relbot_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/relbot_msgs/msg/detail/relbot_motors_stamped__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
